judgeReasoning: The response satisfies all required rubric points: it explains that `group` organizes navigation, llms.txt sections, search metadata, and AGENTS.md grouping; it correctly characterizes `/llms-full.txt` as a single monolithic file containing every doc page (not sharded per group); and it lists well more than two valid optional frontmatter fields (icon, deprecated, experimental, canary, new, draft, tags, full, lastModified, lastAuthor).
